title: Why I Built This Site
description: A brief introduction to this site and why I decided to build it.
content: Getting into writing a blog/having your own website is probably one of the more narcisstic things one can do on the internet. The act assumes you have anything important to contribute.
For a number of people that's certainly true. There must be people out there with good ideas, for me it's potentially true. People have generally enjoyed my thoughts
over the years, if not enjoyed, have at least a few times said were worth sharing. That being said, I certainly haven't met that many people in the grand scheme of things, and my ideas
haven't been subject to mass review, so it's hard to really evaluate the value of my opinions right now.
